subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from Our presence unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, that they may cast aside whatsoever they possess and turn with their hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن فی السموات و الارضین لیدعوا ما عندهم و یتوجهوا بالقلوب
subcodes.subjects: @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
